LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyAwful.label: punga brandy (awful)
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyBase.description: Also known as liquid sunshine, punga brandy is a refined liquor distilled from ripe punga fruit. It is rare, expensive, and prized anywhere a properly stocked bar still exists.
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyDistillery.label: punga brandy still
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyExcellent.label: punga brandy (excellent)
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyGood.label: punga brandy (good)
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyLegendary.label: punga brandy (legendary)
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyMasterwork.label: punga brandy (masterwork)
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyMush.label: punga mash
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyMust.label: punga must
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyNormal.label: punga brandy (normal)
LanguageData.VBE_AmbrandyPoor.label: punga brandy (poor)
LanguageData.VBE_Plant_Coffee.description: A thorny desert shrub carrying honey mesquite pods. The pods roast down into the bitter, stimulating brews that stand in for coffee across the wasteland.
LanguageData.VBE_Plant_Coffee.label: honey mesquite shrub
LanguageData.VBE_Plant_Tea.description: A dense stand of mutated fern. Its fronds steep into a strong herbal drink that fills the niche of tea in the wasteland.
LanguageData.VBE_Plant_Tea.label: mutated fern patch
LanguageData.VBE_Plant_Tobacco.description: A broad-leafed wasteland tobacco strain commonly dried for chew, cigarettes, and cigars.
LanguageData.VBE_Plant_Tobacco.label: coyote tobacco plant
LanguageData.VBE_RawCoffee.description: Dry honey mesquite pods ready to roast into a dark, caffeine-like brew.
LanguageData.VBE_RawCoffee.label: honey mesquite pods
LanguageData.VBE_RawTea.description: Cut mutated fern fronds prepared for steeping into herbal wasteland teas.
LanguageData.VBE_RawTea.label: mutated fern fronds
LanguageData.VBE_RawTobacco.description: Dried coyote tobacco prepared for chewing, rolling, and smoking.
LanguageData.VBE_RawTobacco.label: coyote tobacco chew
LanguageData.VBE_Soda.description: A sweet, fizzy bottle of homebrew sarsparilla. It is more refreshing than nutritious, but the sugar kick is hard to beat.
LanguageData.VBE_Soda.label: homebrew sarsparilla
LanguageData.VBE_SodaFountain.label: sarsparilla fountain
LanguageData.VBE_SodaSyrup.label: sarsparilla syrup
